visual_description: Two silhouetted figures walk across a snow-covered courtyard in front of a large, dimly lit building under a bright moon. A man with dark hair, wearing a maroon jacket over a plaid shirt, leans against a doorframe with a visible cut on his forehead. His gaze is directed toward the camera, and his mouth is slightly open.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice speaking in a low pitch with a slow pace, accompanied by a gasp.
